summary: A fragile ceasefire bid with Iran is the week's dominant catalyst — crude holds above $112 as a Tuesday military deadline looms, keeping energy costs elevated and stagflation fears alive. A shock jobs report showing a loss of 92,000 positions and GDP revised to 0.7% added a hard macro hit, explaining pressure across equities and gold while bonds find modest support.
tweet: Iran ceasefire talks vs. a Tuesday escalation deadline, a jobs miss of 92K, and GDP slashed
